title: Jurisdiction config
description: A single jurisdiction's watcher/analyst configuration (config/jurisdictions/{id}.json), registered from config/site.json's jurisdictions[].config. All jurisdiction-specific knowledge (regulator list, feed URLs, User-Agent string, keyword vocabularies) lives here per the portability constraint; pipeline code under /pipeline must never hardcode any of it. 'pillars' deliberately does NOT appear in this schema -- the shared pillar taxonomy moved to the site-wide config/site.json (see site.json schema) since pillars are shared across jurisdictions, not jurisdiction-specific; 'pillar_keywords' stays here because keyword-to-pillar mapping is jurisdiction-specific (a jurisdiction's own regulatory vocabulary). 'pillar' and 'regulator' values elsewhere in the pipeline (card.json, pillar_state.json, document_library.json) are free text governed jointly by this file's regulators[] and config/site.json's pillars[], deliberately never enumerated in those schemas, to keep them jurisdiction-portable.

pillar_keywords.description: Keyword match against this jurisdiction's own pillar vocabulary. Keys are free text, expected to correspond to pillar ids in config/site.json's pillars[], but not enumerated here to avoid duplicating the shared taxonomy inside a per-jurisdiction schema.

seal_vocabulary.description: Jurisdiction-local seal vocabulary. Kept alongside config/site.json's shared seal_vocabulary for jurisdictions whose regime needs a seal id/label not covered by the shared set.

official_domains.description: Domains treated as authentic primary sources for this regulator; enforced by pipeline/verify/authenticity.py.
